name: Close Grip Chin-Up
aliases: weighted close grip chin-up on dip cage
shortDescription: A vertical pulling exercise emphasizing the lats and biceps using a supinated close grip.
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with hands shoulder-width or closer using a supinated (underhand) grip. Pull your chin over the bar by driving your elbows down and back, then lower under control.
steps: Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width or slightly closer.
Hang at full arm extension, engage your core and back.
Pull your chest towards the bar by driving your elbows down and back.
Clear the bar with your chin, pause briefly at the top.
Lower yourself with control until arms are fully extended.
breathing: Exhale as you pull up, inhale as you lower down.
